public_reputation: Known around Ironspool Ward District through day-to-day work as ward smith.
appearance: Roswyn Sunweave carries the marks of ward smith in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Treats protection as craft, not theater, and distrusts anyone who wants the effect without respecting the process. In Ironspool Ward District, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ward smith in and around Ironspool Ward District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Shelkopolis while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Roswyn Sunweave can draw the party into a locality problem centered on ward smith duties in Ironspool Ward District.
Roswyn Sunweave becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with desperation contracts, petty crime, omens and superstition around Ironspool Ward District.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Roswyn Sunweave is immediately readable as a ward smith tied to Ironspool Ward District.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ironspool Ward District: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Roswyn Sunweave presents as someone shaped by the duties of a ward smith and the daily pressures of Ironspool Ward District.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a ward smith, and proof that strangers will not make Ironspool Ward District harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Roswyn Sunweave refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a ward smith too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can interpret wards, reinforce defenses, and identify magical tampering.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Roswyn Sunweave adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Roswyn Sunweave always knows more about Ironspool Ward District than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a ward smith in Ironspool Ward District.
social_texture: Roswyn Sunweave speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Shelkopolis, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Roswyn touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Roswyn Sunweave when the party needs a socially grounded face for Shelkopolis: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
